    "Smoke detector spacing/placement does not comply with NFPA 72 requirements relative to ceiling geometry, beams, or HVAC diffusers."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt active installation of affected smoke detectors.",
    "Review approved fire alarm shop drawings and NFPA 72 spacing rules.",
    "Relocate detector boxes to compliant locations before pulling wire and finalizing connections."
  ],
  "rationale": "Active installation of smoke detectors with incorrect spacing or placement violates NFPA 72. Continuing work in the wrong locations will result in failed inspections and costly rework. The layout must be corrected immediately while the work is still in-progress.",

  ]
